name: Open WebUI
description: ChatGPT-style web UI for local and remote LLMs.
compose:
name: "slashnode-open-webui"
services:
  open-webui:
    image: "ghcr.io/open-webui/open-webui:main"
    container_name: "open-webui"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:3010:8080"
    volumes:
      - "open-webui-data:/app/backend/data"
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  open-webui-data:
    name: "slashnode-open-webui_open-webui_open-webui-data"
notes: On first launch, create the admin account. Add an Ollama URL or an OpenAI API key under Settings → Connections.
